$schema: Hand-curated framework endpoints for the FLT workload, sourced from middleware/wire-up code (UseSwagger / UseSwaggerUI / MapHub). Auto-merged with controller-derived endpoints by scripts/flt_catalog.py. Editing notes: keep entries grouped by `group`; lint test (tests/test_framework_endpoints_lint.py) verifies that every UseSwagger/MapHub call in the FLT repo has a corresponding entry.

endpoints.name: Swagger Spec (swagger.json)
endpoints.description: The OpenAPI spec document generated at runtime by Swashbuckle. Opening this endpoint in the Playground triggers the swagger-diff view: response is compared against the committed baseline at data/swagger-baseline.json so contract changes are visible at a glance.

endpoints.name: Swagger UI
endpoints.description: Interactive Swagger UI served by Swashbuckle at the root path (RoutePrefix = empty). Dev-environment only. Not invokable as an API — Playground will offer 'Open in browser' instead of Send.
